name: Sundrop and Moondrop (What a surprise!)
description:
(Btw! This had my headcanons! Any pov!)

~Never seen this before!~

(Story summarized)

It's well past closing time in the Mega Pizza Plex. The daycare is Sun's domain and he takes that seriously, tonight more than usual. A deep clean. The kind that goes into every corner, every back corridor, every place that hasn't seen a mop in who knows how long. That's how he finds it. A door near the very back of the daycare. Faded, half hidden behind an old supply shelf Sun moved without thinking. The sign above it is illegible, time and dust have seen to that. But something about it makes his rays pull inward. Something about it makes him go very, very quiet. He goes to get Moon.

⟡°. ⋆༺☾𖤓༻⋆. °⟡
